recommendations.title: My Best Friend Anne Frank
recommendations.overview: Based on the real-life friendship between Anne Frank and Hannah Goslar, from Nazi-occupied Amsterdam to their harrowing reunion in a concentration camp.

recommendations.title: Our Father
recommendations.overview: Two young boys, Valerio and Christian, form a powerful friendship over the summer.

recommendations.title: Rosewood
recommendations.overview: Spurred by a white woman's lie, vigilantes destroy a black Florida town and slay inhabitants in 1923.

recommendations.title: The Trial of the Chicago 7
recommendations.overview: What was supposed to be a peaceful protest turned into a violent clash with the police. What followed was one of the most notorious trials in history.

recommendations.title: Turtles All the Way Down
recommendations.overview: Aza confronts her potential for love, happiness, friendship, and hope while navigating an endless barrage of invasive, obsessive thoughts.

recommendations.title: The Basketball Diaries
recommendations.overview: A high school basketball player’s life turns upside down after free-falling into the harrowing world of drug addiction.

recommendations.title: The Diary of Anne Frank
recommendations.overview: The true, harrowing story of a young Jewish girl who, with her family and their friends, is forced into hiding in an attic in Nazi-occupied Amsterdam.

recommendations.title: Gotti
recommendations.overview: John Gotti rises to the top of the New York underworld to become the boss of the Gambino crime family. His life takes a tumultuous turn as he faces tragedy, multiple trials and a prison sentence.

recommendations.title: First They Killed My Father
recommendations.overview: A 5-year-old girl embarks on a harrowing quest for survival amid the sudden rise and terrifying reign of the Khmer Rouge in Cambodia.

recommendations.title: Glory Road
recommendations.overview: In 1966, Texas Western coach Don Haskins led the first all-black starting line-up for a college basketball team to the NCAA national championship.
